provisions.title: نشرهذا القرار فيعدد الجريدةالرسمية رقم 497ص 421.
provisions.content: نشرهذا القرار فيعدد الجريدةالرسمية رقم 497ص 421.

provisions.title: Amendments in associationwith other regulatory instruments and based on the prog
provisions.content: Amendments in associationwith other regulatory instruments and based on the progress in the IndustryGroup for Number Portability (IGNP)

provisions.title: 1.1 Allwords, terms and phrases used in this Regulatory Policy shall have the me
provisions.content: 1.1 Allwords, terms and phrases used in this Regulatory Policy shall have the meaningsascribed to them, if any, in the Federal Law by Decree no 3 of 2003 regardingthe Organization of the Telecommunications Sector or the TRA's Policy forNational Numbering Plan issued on 1 August 2008 (as amended) or any replacementfor either of them, unless otherwise provided for in this RegulatoryPolicy,

provisions.title: 1.2 Thefollowing words and phrases shall have the meaning ascribed to them below
provisions.content: 1.2 Thefollowing words and phrases shall have the meaning ascribed to them below:

provisions.title: The functionality permittingLicensees to query a database copy of the Centralize
provisions.content: The functionality permittingLicensees to query a database copy of the Centralized Data Base in order toidentify Ported Numbers.

provisions.title: Centralized Data Base(CDB)
provisions.content: Centralized Data Base(CDB)

provisions.title: A centrally held data base ofPorted Numbers which is the reference for Licensees
provisions.content: A centrally held data base ofPorted Numbers which is the reference for Licensees for ACQ.

provisions.title: The Licensee that provides aTelecommunications Service to a Subscriber using a p
provisions.content: The Licensee that provides aTelecommunications Service to a Subscriber using a particular Number, prior toPorting the Number.

provisions.title: A Number associated with aSubscriber for the use of a Telecommunication Service,
provisions.content: A Number associated with aSubscriber for the use of a Telecommunication Service, where that Number is, inaccordance with the National Numbering Plan, of the Format (0Y XXXXXXX, where Yis 2, 3, 4, 6, 7 or 9).

provisions.title: An entity licensed at the dateof the coming into force of this Policy by the Sup
provisions.content: An entity licensed at the dateof the coming into force of this Policy by the Supreme Committee pursuant to theprovisions of the Federal Law by Decree No. 3 of 2003 and its ExecutiveOrder.

provisions.title: A Number associated with aSubscriber for the use of a Telecommunications Service
provisions.content: A Number associated with aSubscriber for the use of a Telecommunications Service, where that Number is inaccordance with the National Numbering Plan, of the format (05X XXXXXXX).

provisions.title: Mobile Number Portability
provisions.content: Mobile Number Portability

provisions.title: Number Portability involving aMobile Number.
provisions.content: Number Portability involving aMobile Number.

provisions.title: Mobile Number Portability
provisions.content: Mobile Number Portability

provisions.title: Regulatory Framework issued bythe TRA in connection with the implementation of M
provisions.content: Regulatory Framework issued bythe TRA in connection with the implementation of Mobile

provisions.title: Mobile Number PortingSystem
provisions.content: Mobile Number PortingSystem

provisions.title: A centralized system used byLicensees for the Porting of Mobile Numbers that com
provisions.content: A centralized system used byLicensees for the Porting of Mobile Numbers that comprises a CDB and an OrderHandling Platform.

provisions.title: A telephone number associatedwith a Subscriber for the use of Telecommunication
provisions.content: A telephone number associatedwith a Subscriber for the use of Telecommunication Service, which telephonenumber is allocated to a party in accordance with the National NumberingPlan.

provisions.title: Order Handling Platform
provisions.content: Order Handling Platform

provisions.title: A centralized platform thatsupports Number Portability processes among Licensees
provisions.content: A centralized platform thatsupports Number Portability processes among Licensees for responding to andinitiating Port requests from Subscribers, including without limitation theexchange of messages among participating Licensees, validation of thesemessages, and the notification of executed Ports to all Licensees.

provisions.title: Entities obtaining a Licenceafter the coming into force of this Policy.
provisions.content: Entities obtaining a Licenceafter the coming into force of this Policy.

provisions.title: The capability or servicewhereby a Subscriber who is being provided with a Telec
provisions.content: The capability or servicewhereby a Subscriber who is being provided with a Telecommunications Service inassociation or connection with a particular Number, can terminate the contractwith the Licensee providing that Telecommunications Service, but continue to usethat Number in association or connection with the provision of aTelecommunications Service by another Licensee.

provisions.title: Shall mean the acceptableperiods of time during which Telecommunication Services
provisions.content: Shall mean the acceptableperiods of time during which Telecommunication Services may be unavailable (infull or in part) to Subscribers during the Porting process, which periods shallbe determined by the TRA.

provisions.title: Number – Reserve –Period
provisions.content: Number – Reserve –Period

provisions.title: A period of time during which aNumber shall not be re-used after the provision o
provisions.content: A period of time during which aNumber shall not be re-used after the provision of a Telecommunications Serviceutilising that Number has ceased, as specified in the Regulatory Framework ineffect at the time and in particular the National Numbering Plan Policy.

provisions.title: With respect to a specificNumber, the retention by the relevant Subscriber of th
provisions.content: With respect to a specificNumber, the retention by the relevant Subscriber of the use of that Number whilefollowing a change in the identity of the Licensee providing the relevantTelecommunications Service, and the terms "Porting", "Ported" and "PortingProcess" shall all have corresponding meanings.

provisions.title: A Telecommunications Servicewhere the Relevant Licensee allows the relevant Subs
provisions.content: A Telecommunications Servicewhere the Relevant Licensee allows the relevant Subscriber to pay for theTelecommunications Service in advance of the actual use of theTelecommunications Service.

provisions.title: A Telecommunications Servicewhere the Relevant Licensee allows the relevant Subs
provisions.content: A Telecommunications Servicewhere the Relevant Licensee allows the relevant Subscriber to pay for asignificant portion of services the Telecommunications Service subsequent to theactual use of the Telecommunications Service.

provisions.title: The Licensee that has beenallocated the Number range/block containing the releva
provisions.content: The Licensee that has beenallocated the Number range/block containing the relevant Ported Number.

provisions.title: Recipient Led Porting
provisions.content: Recipient Led Porting

provisions.title: A process for Number Portabilityunder which the Subscriber wishing to Port a Num
provisions.content: A process for Number Portabilityunder which the Subscriber wishing to Port a Number must contact the RecipientLicensee which will then arrange the process with the Donor Licensee. From theSubscriber's point of view this will be a seamless process requiring thatSubscriber only make contact with the Recipient Licensee.

provisions.title: The Licensee that provides aTelecommunications Service to a Subscriber in associ
provisions.content: The Licensee that provides aTelecommunications Service to a Subscriber in association with a particularNumber following the Porting of that Number.

provisions.title: The regulatory policies,regulations, instructions, orders, resolutions, procedur
provisions.content: The regulatory policies,regulations, instructions, orders, resolutions, procedures, guidelines and othersuch determinations as may be made or amended by the TRA.

provisions.title: An entity that orders and isresponsible for paying for a Telecommunication Servi
provisions.content:
An entity that orders and isresponsible for paying for a Telecommunication Service from a Licensee where theSubscriber does not:
- resell that Telecommunication Service to another;and
- include that Telecommunication Service in or as part of anotherTelecommunication Service (whether as an essential input of commercial;technical or other nature) which it then sells to another

provisions.title: Telecommunication Services
provisions.content: Telecommunication Services

provisions.title: As defined in The Federal Law byDecree No. 3 of 2003 or any subsequent revisions
provisions.content: As defined in The Federal Law byDecree No. 3 of 2003 or any subsequent revisions or new Telecommunications Lawsor related laws as may be issued.

provisions.title: The General Authority forRegulating the Telecommunication Sector in the UAE.
provisions.content: The General Authority forRegulating the Telecommunication Sector in the UAE.

provisions.title: 2.1 AllSubscribers are entitled to Port Number(s) allocated to them regardless o
provisions.content: 2.1 AllSubscribers are entitled to Port Number(s) allocated to them regardless of whichLicensee is providing those Subscribers with the relevant TelecommunicationServices. Number Portability is available in the following instances:

provisions.title: 2.1.1 inthe case of geographic Numbers (or Fixed Numbers) at a specific location
provisions.content: 2.1.1 inthe case of geographic Numbers (or Fixed Numbers) at a specific location;and

provisions.title: 2.1.2 inthe case ofnon-geographicand Mobile Numbers at any location.
provisions.content: 2.1.2 inthe case ofnon-geographicand Mobile Numbers at any location.

provisions.title: For theavoidance of doubt, this will mean that Licensees must make available Num
provisions.content: For theavoidance of doubt, this will mean that Licensees must make available NumberPortability to Subscribers of Telecommunications Services whether the relevantNumbers are geographic, non-geographic or Mobile Numbers, and regardless ofwhether or not the relevant Telecommunications Services are Pre-paid Services orPost-Paid Services.

provisions.title: 2.2Licensees shall make Mobile Number Portability available under reasonablepric
provisions.content: 2.2Licensees shall make Mobile Number Portability available under reasonableprices, terms and conditions to any of their Subscribers who so request,provided that the provisions of this Regulatory Policy, the Mobile NumberPortability Regulations and any other relevant regulatory requirements aremet.

provisions.title: 2.3 Forthe avoidance of doubt, unless the TRA decides otherwise, this Regulatory
provisions.content: 2.3 Forthe avoidance of doubt, unless the TRA decides otherwise, this Regulatory Policywill not apply to New Licensees.

provisions.title: 3.1Licensees shall participate in an industry forum with the objective ofdevelop
provisions.content: 3.1Licensees shall participate in an industry forum with the objective ofdeveloping detailed technical and administrative specifications for NumberPortability. This industry forum shall commence and recommence at dates notifiedby the TRA to the Licensees.

provisions.title: 3.2Licensees shall implement Number Portability at a date to be determined by th
provisions.content: 3.2Licensees shall implement Number Portability at a date to be determined by theTRA and notified to the Licensees.

provisions.title: Anydirect or indirect charges levied by the Licensees in relation to NumberPorta
provisions.content: Anydirect or indirect charges levied by the Licensees in relation to NumberPortability shall not be such as act as a disincentive to the Porting of Numbersby Subscribers. Where required, the TRA shall specify charges, terms andconditions applicable relating to the provision of Number Portability orassociated Telecommunication Services.

provisions.title: Costs andexpenses for the implementation and carrying out of Number Portability
provisions.content: Costs andexpenses for the implementation and carrying out of Number Portability incurredby the Licensees and other entities shall be recovered by, and apportionedamongst those Licensees and other entities, in accordance with the RegulatoryFramework in effect at the time.

provisions.title: 6.1Unless the TRA decides otherwise the appropriate process for Number Portabili
provisions.content: 6.1Unless the TRA decides otherwise the appropriate process for Number Portabilityshall be Recipient Led Porting.

provisions.title: 6.2Accordingly, it is the responsibility of the recipient Licensee to take allre
provisions.content: 6.2Accordingly, it is the responsibility of the recipient Licensee to take allreasonable steps to ensure that the person requesting the Porting of a Number iseither the relevant Subscriber, or in fact authorized on behalf of the relevantSubscriber to do so,

provisions.title: 6.3 TheLicensees shall comply with any Outage Limits which the TRA may set from
provisions.content: 6.3 TheLicensees shall comply with any Outage Limits which the TRA may set from time totime.

provisions.title: 6.4 Inany event the Licensees shall provide Telecommunication Services to allSub
provisions.content: 6.4 Inany event the Licensees shall provide Telecommunication Services to allSubscribers (regardless of whether or not such Telecommunications Services areprovided to a Ported or a non-Ported Number) on a non-discriminatory basis, andat the same published tariffs and on the same terms and conditions as areapplied to the provision of the same type of Telecommunication Services to allother Subscribers.

provisions.title: 7. Fees for the PortedNumbers
provisions.content: 7. Fees for the PortedNumbers

provisions.title: 7.1 Theoriginal Range Holder which has been assigned Numbers by the TRA shall re
provisions.content: 7.1 Theoriginal Range Holder which has been assigned Numbers by the TRA shall remainthe Range Holder regardless of the Subscriber Porting unless the entirerange/block has been Ported to the other Licensee.

provisions.title: 7.2 Theannual fee, which is payable in advance on the first day of January of ea
provisions.content: 7.2 Theannual fee, which is payable in advance on the first day of January of each yearand due to the TRA by a Licensee for a Number allocated to that Licensee by theTRA pursuant to the National Numbering Plan, and the Fees for the Allocation andUse of Number Resources Policies, shall where that Number has been Ported, bepayable by the Licensee from whom the Subscriber is receiving the relevantTelecommunication at the relevant time.

provisions.title: 7.3 Theannual fee for a Number during its Number-Reserve-Period will be paid by
provisions.content: 7.3 Theannual fee for a Number during its Number-Reserve-Period will be paid by theLicensee from whom the Subscriber was receiving the relevant telecommunicationservice before the Number was put into Number- Reserve-Period.

provisions.title: 7.4Ported Numbers shall remain in Number-Reserve-Period before being returned to
provisions.content: 7.4Ported Numbers shall remain in Number-Reserve-Period before being returned tothe Range Holder for re-allocation in accordance to the Regulatory Framework ineffect at the time.

provisions.title: 8. Fraud and CreditWorthiness
provisions.content: 8. Fraud and CreditWorthiness

provisions.title: TheLicensees shall work cooperatively with regard to TRA approved matters of fra
provisions.content: TheLicensees shall work cooperatively with regard to TRA approved matters of fraudand credit worthiness,

provisions.title: 9. Use of Information
provisions.content: 9. Use of Information

provisions.title: TheLicensees shall not use any information about subscribers, gathered or gained
provisions.content: TheLicensees shall not use any information about subscribers, gathered or gained asa result of the implementation or provision of Number Portability, for anyreasons other than the provisioning of Number Portability, and in particular,such information shall not be sold or given away or used for marketingpurposes.

provisions.title: 10. Periodic Reporting
provisions.content: 10. Periodic Reporting

provisions.title: Licenseesand other entities supporting Number Portability shall provide any info
provisions.content: Licenseesand other entities supporting Number Portability shall provide any informationrequested, including periodic reports, to the TRA in the format, manner and atthe time frames determined by the TRA.

provisions.title: ThisRegulatory Policy will be effective from the date of its issue.
provisions.content: ThisRegulatory Policy will be effective from the date of its issue.

provisions.title: The TRAreserves the right to modify, amend or supplement this Regulatory Policy
provisions.content: The TRAreserves the right to modify, amend or supplement this Regulatory Policy at anytime.

provisions.title: [1]لم يردالتاريخالهجري لهذاالقرارالمنشور فيعدد الجريدةالرسمية رقم 497ص 421، فاقت
provisions.content: [1]لم يردالتاريخالهجري لهذاالقرارالمنشور فيعدد الجريدةالرسمية رقم 497ص 421، فاقتضىالتنويه.[2]بالنسبةلإعتمادوإصدارتعليمات خدمةنقل أرقامالهواتفالمتحركة،يراجع القراررقم 26/2009 تاريخ5/8/2009م. المنشورفي ما بعد وفيعدد الجريدةالرسمية رقم 497ص 499.[3]Televoting, radio voting and other mass call voting service number ranges may beexcluded from Number Portability.
